channel.title: Business on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Business on Pi Stack

item.title: EspoCRM vs SuiteCRM vs Dolibarr: Best Self-Hosted CRM 2026
item.description: If you’re running a business and still relying on spreadsheets to track customers, deals, and invoices, you already know the pain of losing context, duplicating work, and missing follow-ups. A Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system solves all of this by centralizing every interaction, opportunity, and document in one searchable, filterable database.
